title: Seaborne Coal: First Half of the Year in the Rear-view Mirror
section_path: Seaborne Coal: First Half of the Year in the Rear-view Mirror
section_path_text: Seaborne Coal: First Half of the Year in the Rear-view Mirror
summary:
Main
By Ulf Bergman
The last six months have witnessed an extensive debate on the virtues of decarbonisation and the need for swift action to combat the effects of climate change. The year has so far seen its fair share of extreme weather and adding to the sense of urgency, with heavy rains and severe flooding in China and Western Europe being some of the most recent examples. North America is on the other hand facing extremely hot and dry weather, which could potentially reduce the size of the harvest in the coming months.
